channel.title: GitHub Visual Basic .NET Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Visual Basic .NET in GitHub

item.title: pdftables/vba-pdftables-api
item.description: Visual Basic for Applications macros for using the PDFTables.com API; contributed by Dan Elgaard

item.title: basildane/WakeOnLAN
item.description: Wake On LAN, WakeOnLAN, shutdown software for Windows. A powerful WOL, ping, shutdown, GUI application.
